---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/bilguuniqo
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:bilguuniqo@gmail.com
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: https://bilguunbatsaikhan.com
---

Hi, my name is **Billy**. I'm an Applied Scientist based in Japan.

This site is where I archive topics related to applied data science, machine
learning, and causal inference — equal parts public notebook and reference for
my future self.

Topics I tend to write about:

- Causal inference (overlap, omitted-variable bias, recommendations as treatments)
- Machine learning in production / MLOps
- The occasional deep dive when I fall down a rabbit hole

If something here is useful, wrong, or worth a conversation, reach out by email.
